message:
chore(deps): Update Node.js dependencies to latest stable versions

Updates bun.lock and package.json with latest compatible dependency versions.
This is a routine maintenance update performed via the library-updater workflow.

Changes documented in UPGRADE_LOG.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
